likely_position: Agency counsel would most likely advise that this scenario presents a substantial risk of violating Government Code § 54952.2(b)(1) because the AI system functioned as an intermediary facilitating indirect communication among a majority of the council regarding a pending item, potentially rendering future actions voidable under § 54960 (see *Hearn v. Governing Bd.* UNVERIFIED). Consequently, counsel would recommend postponing the hearing to permit fresh deliberation by a quorum in compliance with open meeting requirements, and responding to the cure-and-correct demand by adopting an interim policy prohibiting shared AI memory for agenda-related discussions.
